title: Crunchy Spicy British Clove Salad
description: This paleo-friendly dish is a spicy and crunchy sick-day favorite, perfect for adding some excitement to your meal.
instructions: Place the minced garlic cloves, whole clove pods, and kosher salt in a small saucepan. Add enough water to cover by about an inch.
Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, then reduce to low and let simmer for at least 1 hour until the liquids have reduced significantly. Allow to cool completely before using.
Combine cooled clove mixture with green onions, roasted pistachios, and cayenne pepper in a large mixing bowl.
Gently fold together ingredients until well combined. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed.
